ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ic_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the IC device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IC device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the IC device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the IC device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration mode */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IC device that uses this mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration mode */,
  "configuration_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration mode (e.g., master, slave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_modes_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES ic_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration mode that uses this parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., CRESET_B, DONE_IO, CR_SCK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES configuration_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_param_name FOREIGN KEY ("param_name") REFERENCES parameter_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing constraint */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration mode that uses this constraint */,
  "constraint_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing constraint */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the constraint */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the constraint */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the constraint */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_constraints_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES configuration_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the IC device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the IC device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., updated parameter, added constraint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES ic_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IC device that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES ic_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_constraint_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timing constraint that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_constraint_versions_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES timing_constraints ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that this role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
